delta.tokens: -7850 (skill uses fewer tokens despite doing more structured work)

analyst_notes: The Rigor Matrix table structure and cross-agent conflict synthesis are the primary discriminators — the two without_skill failures both missed these.

Eval 2 (CPM Rules code critique) scored 1.0 without_skill — meaning a strong analyst without the skill can match the output quality when given actual code to read. The skill's added value here is structure and the explicit conflict section.
The skill produces shorter outputs (fewer tokens) than the baseline despite more structured content — it focuses agents rather than letting them ramble.
All three with_skill Verdicts named something to kill or defer. Two of three without_skill Verdicts also did. The skill's Conflict section is the genuinely unique structural element.
Timing: with_skill runs take ~50% longer (multi-agent chain). Worth it for high-stakes design decisions; overkill for trivial feature reviews — consider adding a --fast flag.
